name: Ever-Glorious Magical Girl
description: Increases CRIT DMG by 16%. The Elation DMG dealt by the wearer and their memosprites ignores 10% of targets' DEF. For every 5 accumulated Punchline allies gain, the Elation DMG dealt additionally ignores 1% of targets' DEF, stacking up to 10 times.

pieces4.description: The Elation DMG dealt by the wearer and their memosprites ignores 10% of targets' DEF. For every 5 accumulated Punchline allies gain, the Elation DMG dealt additionally ignores 1% of targets' DEF, stacking up to 10 times.
